stimulus:
This task works best in landscape orientation.

If you are using an iPad, please rotate it horizontally before continuing.

You will first complete 1 practice trial.

After that, you will complete 2 blocks of trials, with 3 trials per block.

One picture will appear at a time.

Place the current picture into the grid based on how it belongs with the pictures already shown.

You can still move the earlier pictures if you want to adjust your arrangement.

As soon as you place the current picture into the grid, the next picture will appear automatically.

The practice trial is complete.

You will now begin the main task.

Block 1 of 2

This block has 3 trials.

Block 2 of 2

This block has 3 trials.
